/* CONTACT */
.contact{background:var(--navy)}
.contact .section-tag{color:#7AB8FF}
.contact .section-title{color:white}
.contact .section-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px}
.contact-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:32px}
.contact-box h4{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.7px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-bottom:20px}
.contact-box ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.contact-box ul li{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);padding-left:16px;position:relative}
.contact-box ul li::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:7px;width:5px;height:5px;background:#7AB8FF;border-radius:50%}
.email-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--accent);color:white;text-decoration:none;padding:12px 22px;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-top:20px;transition:background .2s}
.email-link:hover{background:#1a68e0}

@media(max-width:600px){
  .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}

footer{background:#06111F;padding:32px 2rem;text-align:center}
footer p{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3)}

/* ===================== ANIMATIONS ===================== */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes floatOrb {
  0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
  33%       { transform: translate(20px, -15px) scale(1.05); }
  66%       { transform: translate(-15px, 10px) scale(0.97); }
}
@keyframes navSlideDown {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(46,125,247,0.3); }
  50%       { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(46,125,247,0); }
}
@keyframes shimmer {
  0%   { background-position: -200% center; }
  100% { background-position: 200% center; }
}

/* Nav */
nav { animation: navSlideDown 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both; }
.nav-links a { position: relative; }
.nav-links a::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -3px; left: 0;
  width: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--accent);
  border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.25s ease;
}
.nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.nav-cta {
  animation: pulse 3s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
  transition: background .2s, transform .15s;
}
.nav-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }

/* Hero orbs */
.hero::before { animation: floatOrb 8s ease-in-out infinite; }
.hero::after  { animation: floatOrb 10s ease-in-out 2s infinite; }

/* Hero entrance */
.hero-tag    { animation: fadeUp .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .15s both; }
.hero h1     { animation: fadeUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .28s both; }
.hero p      { animation: fadeUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .40s both; }
.hero-btns   { animation: fadeUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .52s both; }
.hero-stats  { animation: fadeUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .64s both; }

/* Scroll-reveal base */
.reveal {
  opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px);
  transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
}
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.reveal-left {
  opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-36px);
  transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
}
.reveal-left.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
.reveal-right {
  opacity: 0; transform: translateX(36px);
  transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
}
.reveal-right.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
.reveal-scale {
  opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.93);
  transition: opacity 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
}
.reveal-scale.visible { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }

/* Stagger delays */
.stagger-1 { transition-delay: 0.05s !important; }
.stagger-2 { transition-delay: 0.12s !important; }
.stagger-3 { transition-delay: 0.19s !important; }
.stagger-4 { transition-delay: 0.26s !important; }
.stagger-5 { transition-delay: 0.33s !important; }
.stagger-6 { transition-delay: 0.40s !important; }

/* Card hovers */
.leader-card {
  transition: transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), box-shadow 0.28s ease, border-color 0.28s ease;
}
.leader-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(11,30,61,0.12);
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.benefit-card {
  transition: transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), box-shadow 0.28s ease;
}
.benefit-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(11,30,61,0.09); }
.partner-card {
  transition: transform 0.24s ease, box-shadow 0.24s ease, border-color 0.24s ease;
}
.partner-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(11,30,61,0.08); border-color: var(--teal); }
.phase { transition: transform 0.24s ease, box-shadow 0.24s ease; }
.phase:hover { transform: translateX(6px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(11,30,61,0.07); }
.cost-card { transition: transform 0.28s ease, box-shadow 0.28s ease; }
.cost-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(11,30,61,0.10); }

/* Buttons */
.btn-primary, .btn-ghost, .email-link {
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(46,125,247,0.35); background: #1a68e0; }
.btn-ghost:hover   { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); }
.email-link:hover  { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(46,125,247,0.30); background: #1a68e0; }

/* Mission quote shimmer */
.mission-quote { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.mission-quote::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -100%;
  width: 60%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,0.04),transparent);
  animation: shimmer 4s ease-in-out 1s infinite;
}

/* Benefit icon hover */
.benefit-icon { transition: background 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; }
.benefit-card:hover .benefit-icon { background: var(--accent); transform: scale(1.1) rotate(5deg); }
.benefit-card:hover .benefit-icon svg { stroke: white; }

/* Partner dot */
.partner-dot { transition: transform 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease; }
.partner-card:hover .partner-dot { transform: scale(1.6); background: var(--accent); }

/* About visual */
.about-visual { transition: transform 0.35s ease, box-shadow 0.35s ease; }
.about-visual:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(11,30,61,0.18); }

/* Avatar */
.leader-avatar { transition: transform 0.28s ease; }
.leader-card:hover .leader-avatar { transform: scale(1.06); }

/* Contact boxes */
.contact-box { transition: background 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; }
.contact-box:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); transform: translateY(-3px); }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a class="nav-brand" href="#">
    <div class="nav-logo">S</div>
    <span class="nav-name">STEM For All</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about" onclick="closeNav()">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#leadership" onclick="closeNav()">Leadership</a></li>
    <li><a href="#mission" onclick="closeNav()">Mission</a></li>
    <li><a href="#programs" onclick="closeNav()">Programs</a></li>
    <li><a href="#partners" onclick="closeNav()">Partners</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" onclick="closeNav()">Contact</a></li>
    <li><a href="learn.html" style="color:var(--teal);font-weight:600" onclick="closeNav()">✦ Learn</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a class="nav-cta" href="#contact">Get Involved</a>
  <button class="nav-toggle" onclick="toggleNav()" aria-label="Toggle menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <span class="hero-tag">St. Louis, Missouri</span>
    <h1>Empowering Minds,<br><em>Engineering Futures</em></h1>
    <p>Expanding STEM access for underprivileged students across the greater St. Louis area through robotics teams and hands-on workshops.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="#about">Learn More</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#contact">Get Involved</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">2024</span><span class="stat-label">Team Founded</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">5</span><span class="stat-label">Team Members</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">23+</span><span class="stat-label">Outreach Events</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">$2K+</span><span class="stat-label">Funds Raised</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="about-visual reveal-left" style="background:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:300px;padding:32px;border:1px solid var(--border)">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Brute Force Robotics — STEM For All" style="width:100%;max-width:380px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="section-tag reveal">Our Story</p>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal stagger-1">Founded to make STEM accessible to everyone</h2>
        <p class="about-txt reveal stagger-3">Founded in 2024 by Rishi Madhavan, STEM For All is a nonprofit launched through the Brute Force Robotics team to expand STEM access for underprivileged students across the greater St. Louis area.</p>
        <p class="about-txt reveal stagger-4">We provide robotics teams and hands-on workshops that inspire the next generation of engineers, scientists, and innovators. Our student-run organization is committed to making STEM education accessible to all, regardless of background or economic status.</p>
        <span class="about-founded reveal stagger-5">📍 Greater St. Louis Area</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LEADERSHIP -->
<section class="leadership" id="leadership">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="section-tag reveal">Our Team</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal stagger-1">Leadership</h2>
    <p class="section-sub reveal stagger-2">Meet the students leading STEM For All's mission to expand access and opportunity.</p>
    <div class="leadership-grid">
      <div class="leader-card reveal stagger-1">
        <img class="leader-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Saideep Kondamadgula">
        <div>
          <div class="leader-name">Saideep Kondamadgula</div>
          <div class="leader-role pres">President</div>
          <div class="leader-note">Leading STEM For All's vision, strategy, and community partnerships across the St. Louis area.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal stagger-2">
        <img class="leader-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Om Garine">
        <div>
          <div class="leader-name">Om Garine</div>
          <div class="leader-role vp">Vice President</div>
          <div class="leader-note">Supporting program operations, team coordination, and student outreach initiatives.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal stagger-3">
        <img class="leader-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Anish Shinde">
        <div>
          <div class="leader-name">Anish Shinde</div>
          <div class="leader-role tr">Director of Development</div>
          <div class="leader-note">Driving program development, partnerships, and growth initiatives across the St. Louis area.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal stagger-4">
        <img class="leader-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sanay Nemmadi">
        <div>
          <div class="leader-name">Sanay Nemmadi</div>
          <div class="leader-role fd">Director of Curriculum</div>
          <div class="leader-note">Overseeing curriculum design and educational content for robotics programs and STEM workshops.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal stagger-5">
        <img class="leader-avatar" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Suhas Ramineni">
        <div>
          <div class="leader-name">Suhas Ramineni</div>
          <div class="leader-role sec">Secretary</div>
          <div class="leader-note">Handling communications, meeting records, and organizational documentation for STEM For All.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MISSION -->
<section class="mission" id="mission">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="section-tag reveal">Our Mission</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal stagger-1">Why we do what we do</h2>
    <div class="mission-quote reveal-scale">
      <blockquote>"Empowering Minds, Engineering Futures"</blockquote>
    </div>
    <div class="benefits-grid">
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-1">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Strong connections</h4>
        <p>Building lasting relationships between students, mentors, and the wider STEM community.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-2">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Career opportunities</h4>
        <p>STEM skills open doors to high-demand careers and build economic mobility for students.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-3">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Stronger communities</h4>
        <p>Robotics fosters collaboration, critical thinking, and constructive engagement in youth.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-4">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Communication skills</h4>
        <p>Students develop confidence in public speaking, teamwork, and professional communication.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-5">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><line x1="8" y1="21" x2="16" y2="21"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12" y2="21"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Business & media skills</h4>
        <p>Students learn social media management, budgeting, and entrepreneurial thinking.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal stagger-6">
        <div class="benefit-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg></div>
        <h4>Positive outlets</h4>
        <p>Providing constructive, goal-driven activities that help students stay on positive paths.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROGRAMS -->
<section class="programs" id="programs">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="section-tag reveal">Our Programs</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal stagger-1">Plan of execution</h2>
    <p class="section-sub reveal stagger-2">A phased approach to building self-sustaining STEM teams in underserved communities.</p>
    <div class="phases">
      <div class="phase reveal stagger-1">
        <div class="phase-num">1</div>
        <div>
          <h4>Phase 1 — Initiation</h4>
          <ul>
            <li>Contact local city schools</li>
            <li>Presentations to garner interest</li>
            <li>Robotics drive</li>
            <li>Fundraising</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="phase reveal stagger-2">
        <div class="phase-num">2</div>
        <div>
          <h4>Phase 2 — Creating Teams</h4>
          <ul>
            <li>Educate kids</li>
            <li>Guide teachers</li>
            <li>Create teams</li>
            <li>Mentor students</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="phase reveal stagger-3">
        <div class="phase-num">3</div>
        <div>
          <h4>Phase 3 — Self Independence</h4>
          <ul>
            <li>Year 1: Coaches & core values</li>
            <li>Year 2+: Limited coaching</li>
            <li>Focus on self-sustainability</li>
            <li>Create recruiting process</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="costs-grid">
      <div class="cost-card reveal stagger-1">
        <span class="cost-badge">FLL</span>
        <div class="cost-amount">$2,500–$4,000</div>
        <div class="cost-label">Per team per season · FIRST Lego League</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cost-card featured reveal stagger-2">
        <span class="cost-badge">FTC</span>
        <div class="cost-amount">$100–$200</div>
        <div class="cost-label">Per team per season · FIRST Tech Challenge</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PARTNERS -->
<section class="partners" id="partners">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="section-tag reveal">Partners & Events</p>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal stagger-1">Our community network</h2>
    <p class="section-sub reveal stagger-2">Schools, venues, and organizations that make our work possible.</p>
    <div class="partners-schools">
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-1"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Green Pines Elementary</div>
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-2"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Chesterfield Elementary</div>
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-3"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Center for Creative Learning</div>
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-4"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Rockwood Valley Middle School</div>
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-5"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Eureka Elementary</div>
      <div class="partner-card reveal stagger-6"><span class="partner-dot"></span>Wildwood Middle School</div>
    </div>
    <div class="events-cols">
      <div class="events-col reveal-left">
        <h4>Community Attractions</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>St. Louis Union Station</li>
          <li>St. Louis Art Museum (SLAM)</li>
          <li>Rumble at the Raceway</li>
          <li>Soap Box Derby</li>
          <li>Kids Korner</li>
          <li>Daniel Boone Library</li>
          <li>Celebrate Wildwood Event</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="events-col reveal-right">
        <h4>Collaboration Events</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Emerson STEM Day</li>
          <li>Murugan Temple Concert Booth</li>
          <li>Scoutbotics at SLU</li>
          <li>Trunk or Treat (Serra Honda)</li>
          <li>Ladue FLL Expo</li>
          <li>GoSTL Volunteering</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>&copy; 2025 STEM For All &middot; Greater St. Louis Area &middot; Built by students, for students</p>
</footer>

<script>
// Scroll reveal
const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-right,.reveal-scale')
  .forEach(el => revealObs.observe(el));

// Stat counter
function animCounter(el, target, suffix) {
  const isYear = target > 1000;
  const dur = 1200, start = performance.now();
  const from = isYear ? target - 8 : 0;
  function step(now) {
    const p = Math.min((now - start) / dur, 1);
    const e = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
    el.textContent = Math.round(from + (target - from) * e) + suffix;
    if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
}
const statObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting && !e.target.dataset.counted) {
      e.target.dataset.counted = '1';
      const nums = e.target.querySelectorAll('.stat-num');
      const data = [{v:2024,s:''},{v:5,s:''},{v:23,s:'+'},{v:2,s:'K+'}];
      nums.forEach((el,i) => { if(data[i]) animCounter(el, data[i].v, data[i].s); });
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.4 });
const st = document.querySelector('.hero-stats');
if (st) statObs.observe(st);

// Nav scroll shadow
const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.style.boxShadow = window.scrollY > 20 ? '0 2px 20px rgba(11,30,61,0.10)' : '';
}, {passive:true});

// Mobile nav
function toggleNav() { document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open'); }
function closeNav()  { document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.remove('open'); }
</script>
</body>
</html>
